content.summary: I am feeling the same. Amira Zairi (@azed_ai) I worked from 12 p.m. to 12 a.m... I truly love creating content, but lately this algorithm has made it feel a lot less enjoyable It’s not about numbers or money, especially since I’m not getting paid anyway. For me, it’s about the community If I put time and energy into creating content and only 10% of my followers actually see it, then what’s the point? I’m honestly getting tired of X, and I’m not here as much as I used to be I just hope this gets fixed soon — https://nitter.net/azed_ai/status/2036580149085511871#m

Post title: I am feeling the same.

Post summary: I am feeling the same. Amira Zairi (@azed_ai) I worked from 12 p.m. to 12 a.m... I truly love creating content, but lately this algorithm has made it feel a lot less enjoyable It’s not about numbers or money, especially since I’m not getting paid anyway. For me, it’s about the community If I put time and energy into creating content and only 10% of my followers actually see it, then what’s the point? I’m honestly getting tired of X, and I’m not here as much as I used to be I just hope this gets fixed soon — https://nitter.net/azed_ai/status/2036580149085511871#m
